description.content: Returns the current health status of the API.
Generates a nonce for the given signer address. The returned dataHex must be signed by the wallet to complete authentication.

response.name: Invalid request. Possible reasons: script address provided, invalid address format, or pool not found.

description.content: Verifies the wallet signature against the previously issued nonce. On success a JWT token is returned and set as an HTTP-only cookie.

response.name: Signature verified. A JWT token is returned and set as an HTTP-only cookie named "token".

description.content: HTTP-only cookie containing the JWT token.

response.name: Verification failed. Possible reasons: nonce not found or signature error.

description.content: Returns the voter ID associated with the current session.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Invalidates the current session and clears the auth cookie.

response.name: Successfully logged out. The auth cookie is cleared.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Generates a nonce for multisig authentication. Requires both a signer address and a script address.

response.name: Invalid request. Possible reasons: missing or invalid script address, or address is not CIP-129 compliant.

item.name: Verify multisig signature and create session

request.name: Verify multisig signature and create session

description.content: Verifies the multisig wallet signature against the previously issued nonce and creates an authenticated session.

response.name: Multisig signature verified. A JWT token is returned and set as an HTTP-only cookie.

description.content: HTTP-only cookie containing the JWT token.

response.name: Verification failed. Possible reasons: invalid script address, nonce not found, or signer is not a party to the multisig.

description.content: Submits a vote on the specified proposal. The ballot must be live, the voter must be registered, vote values must correspond to valid voteOptions, and the total cost of selected options must not exceed the voter's budget.
(Required) Unique proposal identifier. Must be a 24-character alphanumeric string.

description.content: Returns detailed information about a specific voter including their voting history across ballots and proposals. The voterId must start with stake, drep, or pool. Responses are cached for 5 minutes.

The Ekklesia Voting API provides endpoints for decentralized governance voting on the Cardano blockchain. It supports session-based authentication via wallet signature verification, ballot and proposal management, vote submission, commenting, and voter information retrieval.


Contact Support:
 Name: Ekklesia API Support
